headline: Are Wall Street Analysts Predicting Regeneron Pharmaceuticals Stock Will Climb or Sink?
summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals has underperformed the broader market over the past year, and analysts remain reasonably bullish about the stock’s long term prospects.

headline: Dr. Scott Gottlieb on Ebola outbreak: This is an outbreak that's out of control in West Africa
summary: Former FDA Commissioner Dr. Scott Gottlieb joins 'Squawk Box' to discuss the latest developments on the Ebola outbreak, risks to the United States, GLP-1's impact on cancer risks, and more.
